title: Populate Data in Fields from PDF or Word Files
excerpt: We are a recruiting firm and we’re trying to use Monday as our applicant tracking system. Is there a way to upload a candidate resume to a board and have it auto-populate Name, Email, Phone number, etc. FROM the resume? …

posts.author: ivywille (Ivy Wille)
posts.cookedHtml: We are a recruiting firm and we’re trying to use Monday as our applicant tracking system. Is there a way to upload a candidate resume to a board and have it auto-populate Name, Email, Phone number, etc. FROM the resume? So each line item on the board would be a candidates name, then we’d upload the resume to auto-populate the contact info fields, etc.?
